text: 英語 聽力 模擬 是題 十五
第一節
聽下面五段對話
每段對話後有一個小題
從題中所給的
A B C 3個選項中選出最佳選項
聽完每段對話後
你都有十秒鐘的時間
來回答有關小題和閱讀下一小題
每段對話僅獨一遍
現在你有五秒鐘的時間
閱讀第一小題的有關內容
Dad, look, I can climb the stairs now
Oh my God, sweetheart, be careful not to trip on the steps
Your legs haven't fully recovered yet
And the doctor advised you to avoid unnecessary movements
You've come back just in time
The TV drama is about to start
I don't feel like watching TV
I'm dying of thirst
There happens to be some fresh orange juice in the fridge
When you go to get it, please bring some bread for me
Are you going to apply to lead the new project?
The application deadline is this Friday
I'm still hesitating
It's already Wednesday
Remember, he who hesitates is lost
If you haven't applied by Friday, you'll miss the chance
You're right, I'll hand in my application tomorrow
Jenny, I heard you moved house last weekend
What kind of place are you living in now?
It's just a little flat
Right next to the city library
I really love the kitchen
Oh, that area is nice and quiet
Excuse me, sir
Your dog isn't on a lead
It's against the rules of our park
Oh, sorry
I wanted to train my dog to catch the frisbee
I understand, but dogs without a lead
can be a threat to the safety of visitors
The 1st step, the 2nd step
I heard the two steps of the school
In practising last
a few wichtige lessons
From the subject that you paid
A B C
three draft instruments
And it wasn't about the course
I heard the exams
You've got time to read the average
Each smaller step plus 5 seconds
After listening
each teacher teaches for the time
Everyday compare between two drops for the two hundred.
To see a pair of subtraction,
return the six and seven small drops to the first of last drops.
The subtraction must be around ten.
Now when we go 3 seconds later,
we will read the dashes twice for the second drop.
